captures.alt: Desktop production ReproForge privacy notice showing bounded inputs, provider purposes, 30-day and 365-day retention, account export and deletion, and the no-analytics disclosure.

captures.alt: Mobile production ReproForge security page showing private vulnerability reporting, immutable repository authorization, deny-all sandbox execution, OAuth checks, and private-beta limits without horizontal overflow.

sanitization: Public static policy content only; no account, credential, tenant, private repository, provider resource, cookie, or user data.
provenance: First-party captures of the exact ReproForge production deployment recorded above; not concept art, generated imagery, or a ChatGPT-host screenshot.
openGates: Auth0, GitHub App installation, signed-in public/private canaries, and ChatGPT-host evidence are not claimed by this record.
